name: configure_superapp_module
description: Open an existing Super App AI module in its editor so the merchant can change it (copy, styling, offer, thresholds, rules, etc.). Optionally pre-fills a requested change. The merchant makes and saves the edit in Super App AI — this action only navigates them there and never edits the module automatically.

moduleId.description: The id of the module to configure (from a search_modules result).

instruction.description: Optional description of the change to make.
